use_cases: Primary action triggers in pricing cards and checkout flows
Call-to-action buttons in landing pages and marketing sections
Form submission and interactive UI controls
Navigation and link-based interactions with variant styles
ai_summary: A versatile button component built with Radix UI Slot and class-variance-authority, providing multiple visual variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes for flexible use across pricing pages, forms, and call-to-action sections. Features standard accessibility focus states, disabled states, and shadow effects with minimal visual complexity.
